f the people.
If the lord of the Ascendant should occupy the 1st, 2nd or
3rd decanate of the Lagna, the native would be a judge, governor
or village-headman, as the case may be. If on the other hand,
the planet concerned should be aspected by or conjoined with
Venus, Jupiter or Mercury, and be situated in a benefic Varga
or in his exaltation, he would become an emperor.
Ihe Moon occupying different signs and aspected by the
several planets also shows some kind of professional inclination :
(i) In Gemini she being aspected by Mars and Saturn makes
one a blacksmith and a weaver respectively. In modern world
the appellation blacksmith would include mechanical engineer,
worker in a type foundry, iron works etc.
(ii) In Leo she being aspected by Mercury makes one an
astrologer, and by Saturn a barber.
(hi) hi Scoipio aspected by Venus, she makes one a soldier.
The Navamsa occupied by the Moon gives some guidance
in this direction : —
